benchmark.note: Reviewer-prompt regression profile. The four reviewer-* fixtures (kind: reviewer-prompt) each assert an expected verdict + expected findings against a known reviewer-prompt input. Run through the reviewer scorer, NOT run-benchmark.cjs --scorer pattern/5dim: `--scorer reviewer` routes here via the /deep:model-benchmark YAML, gated on SPECKIT_REVIEWER_BENCHMARKS. Reviewer scoring is correctness-gated: a fixture passes only when the extracted verdict and required findings match the oracle.
